subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! One effulgence from among the effulgences of the Ancient Beauty was the manifest light that illumined the horizons of all regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه یک تجلی از تجلیات جمال قدیم نور مبین بود که آفاق اقالیمرا روشن
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
